raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "AB 1390 updates the law so the Commission can optimize its land holdings for revenue generation and meet both goals.",
    "Antiquated restrictions prevent the Commission from effectively generating revenues for California State Teachers Retirement System (CalSTRS).",
    "AB 1390 removes constraints that prevent the Commission from maximizing revenue from existing state land holdings.",
    "Outdated laws are undermining the Commission’s competitiveness as a land buyer.",
    "AB 1390 will clear the way for investments needed to secure a more sustainable future for all Californians.",
    "The Biden Administration will seek to work with states on leasing land suitable for solar and wind projects as part of its goal to cut U.S. greenhouse gas emissions in half by the end of the decade."
  ]
}
```
